name: enterprise-coordination
description: Upstream-coordination AI tooling for enterprise engineering. Five workflows + a meta-orchestrator that fans out across all of them. Skills: meeting analysis, PM domain memory, cross-team integration, on-call pattern recognition, PR review with measurable bug recall. 7 MCP servers (4 local, 3 live-API: GitHub, Confluence, Grafana). MCP gateway with audit + secrets-scanner + cost dashboard. Ships as one installable plugin.
